hero.subtitle: Tunajenga tovuti ambazo watu hawapiti tu — wanasimama na <0>kuangalia tena</0>.

features.title: Stack ya kisasa
features.subtitle: Kila kipengele cha tovuti kimefikiriwa. Kutoka animation hadi typography — kila kitu kina nafasi na lengo lake.

micro_motion.title: Micro-motion kila mahali
micro_motion.desc: Kila hover, scroll na click ina animation yake. Tovuti haionekani static kamwe.

three_d.title: 3D bila maelewano
three_d.desc: Scene nyepesi za Three.js (<200KB) na lazy-loading. Inakwenda vizuri hata kwenye laptop ya kawaida.

performance.title: Performance kwanza
performance.desc: Lighthouse 95+. Build chunks chini ya 500KB. Lazy images, preload fonts, GPU animations.

typography.title: Typography ya fonts 4
typography.desc: Apoc, Azonix, Quffer, Urbanist — uongozi wa kuvutia kutoka 220px hero hadi 14px caption.

cta.subtitle: Sanidi mradi kwa sekunde 30, mwambie Claude unachotaka, pata <0>tovuti tayari kwa uzalishaji</0> kwa saa moja.
